summary: Repaired corrupted CI workflow SHA pins and Go template syntax

findings.root_cause: SHA-pin tool appended API error responses to action version fields and corrupted Go template expressions
findings.corruption_pattern: actions/checkout@SHA@{"message":"Not Found"}... and $123var125 instead of ${{ var }}
findings.verification: 0 corruptions remain across all 3 fixed files

next_actions: Remove stale dependabot configs referencing ${{ matrix.go-version }} in deny.yml and other workflow files across the fleet
Verify CI run on next push to phenotype-apps main
Apply same fix pattern to other repos with corrupted workflows
